---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or workflow improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem or workflow gap are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful version of the change.

## Alternatives considered

What are you doing today instead?

## Extra context

If this affects CLI surface, say whether it should be:

- interactive TUI behavior
- `whale exec`
- `whale doctor`
- `whale setup`
- a future server/headless API surface
